standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per positive state episode

candidate_boundary_notice.reason: The candidate output lacks a narrow Amsterdam HFNC source even though the public advanced-respiratory-support concept includes HFNC.
candidate_boundary_notice.approval_gate: candidate runtime evidence only until detailed review and owner approval close

source_status_code_labels.std_invasive_mechanical_ventilation_acti: approved Amsterdam invasive mechanical ventilation parent

database_mapping.source_grain: one governed Amsterdam parent respiratory-support positive episode
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained positive derived support-family episode after same-stay interval union

identifier_normalization.subject_id_role: patientid inherited from approved parent assets
identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: not separately available in the current Amsterdam opening mapping
identifier_normalization.stay_id_role: admissionid inherited from approved parent assets and normalized to ICU/MC stay_id

state_episode_build_translation.positive_state_translation: retain unioned IMV and NIV/CPAP parent episodes; HFNC is not sourced in Amsterdam current source surface
state_episode_build_translation.episode_start_translation: use the merged parent-support interval start
state_episode_build_translation.episode_end_translation: use the merged parent-support interval end
state_episode_build_translation.continuity_translation: merge overlapping or exactly contiguous included parent intervals within the same stay
state_episode_build_translation.no_row_translation: absence of a row means no retained positive episode under this candidate source rule

validation_contract.positive_only_no_row_policy_check: false rows are not emitted; absence of row is not universal negative proof
notes: Build-first candidate mapping; owner approval is explicitly pending.
The candidate output lacks a narrow Amsterdam HFNC source even though the public advanced-respiratory-support concept includes HFNC.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: Candidate output should be generated through the governed execution.py path and reviewed before approval.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Approval-facing outputs should be produced only through the governed execution.py path.
